response: ANGEL HAS WRITTEN A TOTAL OF 80 LETTERS. MOST OF THE LETTERS ARE PUT INTO LARGE ENVELOPES AND THE REMAINING 20 LETTERS ARE PUT INTO SMALL ENVELOPES. THE LARGE ENVELOPES EACH CONTAIN 2 LETTERS EACH. TO FIND HOW MANY LARGE ENVELOPES SHE USED, WE DIVIDE THE TOTAL NUMBER OF LETTERS BY THE NUMBER OF LETTERS PER LARGE ENVELOPE. 80 DIVIDED BY 2 EQUALS 40. THEREFORE, ANGEL USED 40 LARGE ENVELOPES. ALL OF THE LETTERS ARE PUT INTO ENVELOPES, AND NO LETTERS ARE LEFT UNDELIVERED. THE LARGE ENVELOPES EACH CONTAIN 2 LETTERS, AND THERE ARE 40 LARGE ENVELOPES.
